budgetEvidence.hardwareTimingRationale: The DMG Window uses its independent $9C00 tilemap at WX=7/WY=0; startup writes occur with LCD disabled and the retained HUD remains separate from background scroll state.
budgetEvidence.productionTraceRationale: The exact production HUD ROM keeps Icon/One/Two/Three in window cells 0..3 for every retained frame while its WaitVBlank loop advances at physical-frame cadence.
